measurement_note: Size is C, the number of content rows. The 32/128/512 tiers span 16x and contain two TVProgram rows per content item: all July rows precede all June rows, so each correlated match occurs late. The range-filtered join processes the relations together in O(P + C + T log T) expected time. A correct correlated EXISTS query without a fixture index rescans TVProgram for each content row, completes normally at C = 512, and is rejected by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: 32 content rows and 64 program rows
benchmark: 128 content rows and 256 program rows
benchmark: 512 content rows and 1024 program rows
